tasks.name: DIWAS0 slice (code)
tasks.description: Implement DIWAS0 production changes for the standard missing-artifact preflight.
acceptance_criteria: DIWAS0 acceptance criteria are implemented and traceable through the slice spec.
The work stays scoped to the standard version-dir flow.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/dev-install-world-agent-staging && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, contract.md, slice spec, and kickoff prompt.
Set the task status to in_progress and add a START entry in session_log.md.
end_checklist: Record a targeted before-and-after command for the handoff.
Run the task-specific validation commands from the kickoff prompt.
Run `make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="DIWAS0-code"` from inside the worktree.

tasks.name: DIWAS0 slice (integration)
tasks.description: Merge DIWAS0 code and tests and make the slice green.
acceptance_criteria: Local integration gates are green for DIWAS0.
DIWAS0 is merged back to the orchestration branch.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/dev-install-world-agent-staging && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, slice spec, and kickoff prompt.
Set the task status to in_progress and add a START entry in session_log.md.
end_checklist: Merge `DIWAS0-code` and `DIWAS0-test`.
Run `cargo fmt`.
Run `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`.
Run `cargo test -p shell --test world_enable -- --nocapture`.
Run `make integ-checks`.
Run `make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="DIWAS0-integ"` from inside the worktree.

tasks.name: DIWAS1 slice (integration core)
tasks.description: Merge DIWAS1 code and tests on the primary platform before the checkpoint runs.
acceptance_criteria: Local integration gates are green for the boundary slice.
The core integration branch is ready for `CP1-ci-checkpoint`.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/dev-install-world-agent-staging && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, checkpoint plan, slice spec, and kickoff prompt.
Set the task status to in_progress and add a START entry in session_log.md.
end_checklist: Run `cargo fmt`.
Run `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`.
Run `bash tests/installers/install_smoke.sh`.
Run `bash docs/project_management/packs/draft/dev-install-world-agent-staging/smoke/linux-smoke.sh`.
Run `make integ-checks`.
Run `make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="DIWAS1-integ-core"` from inside the worktree.

tasks.name: CP1 CI checkpoint (cross-platform validation)
tasks.description: Run compile parity, feature smoke, and quick CI testing for the checkpoint boundary slice.
acceptance_criteria: Checkpoint CI evidence is recorded for the checkpoint SHA.
Compile parity and Linux feature smoke are green for the checkpoint SHA.
Quick CI testing evidence is recorded for the checkpoint SHA.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/dev-install-world-agent-staging && git pull --ff-only
Read the checkpoint plan, tasks.json, session_log.md, and the kickoff prompt.
Set the task status to in_progress and add a START entry in session_log.md.
end_checklist: Run ci-audit and record the result lines or skip evidence.
Dispatch compile parity, feature smoke, and quick CI testing for the checkpoint SHA.
Mark `CP1-ci-checkpoint` completed in tasks.json on the orchestration checkout.

tasks.name: Feature cleanup (worktrees and local branches)
tasks.description: Remove retained worktrees and close the feature after the final integration and checkpoint complete.
acceptance_criteria: All slice and checkpoint tasks are complete.
Feature planning surfaces are aligned for promotion or execution review.
Retained worktrees are removed by the cleanup script.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/dev-install-world-agent-staging && git pull --ff-only
Confirm every task is complete and merged as intended.
Set the task status to in_progress and add a START entry in session_log.md.
end_checklist: Run `make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/dev-install-world-agent-staging" DRY_RUN=1 REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1`.
Run `make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/dev-install-world-agent-staging" REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1`.
Paste the cleanup summary into the END entry in session_log.md and mark the task complete.
